assumption: The current official generated wiki is valid for its planned scope but insufficient for DeepWiki-style breadth.
The benchmark export is useful as a breadth signal but not source truth because it was indexed at a different commit.
Repository-derived signals can identify enough high-value facets to justify a deeper hierarchy.
Phase 3 can remain deterministic if page/topic evidence obligations are explicit before retrieval.
Grounded claim-plan rendering can scale to per-page generation while preserving strict validation.
The first expanded target band should be calibrated after catalog generation rather than fixed solely from the benchmark.
